heading: Records and inspection
label: 70509 Records and inspection
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7050936:583., .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 911, § 1368 Stat. 799The word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7050936:583., .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 911, § 1368 Stat. 799The word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

children.text: correct and complete records of account;
minutes of the proceedings of its members, board of directors, and committees having any of the authority of its board of directors; and
at its principal office, a record of the names and addresses of its members entitled to vote.

children.heading: .—Inspection
children.label: b .—Inspection
children.text: A member entitled to vote, or an agent or attorney of the member, may inspect the records of the corporation for any proper purpose, at any reasonable time.
